Invoices to be Raised (AR)

Client invoice not yet issued
Cycles where you should raise an invoice to the client. Year 1: due by contract start + 15 days. Renewals: due 7 days before anniversary.
Target Raise Date Client / Product Cycle Amount Urgency Action

OEM Invoices Expected (AP)

Awaiting OEM to send invoice
Cycles where the OEM should have invoiced us by now. Follow up if overdue.
Expected Date OEM / Product Cycle Amount Urgency Action

Contracts Expiring Soon (Renewal Engine)

Contracts expiring in the next 90 days that haven't been confirmed renewed yet. Act early on critical (≤30d) renewals to protect retained revenue.
Expiry Date Client / Product Annual Value Days Left Milestones Renewal Status Action

Actionable Invoices & Operations (Cross-Portfolio)

Rules: Year 1 invoices due 15d after start. Renewals 7d before anniversary.

Company Profile

Your company details appear on every Proposal, PO, and Invoice
Fill this in once — it's the foundation for all outbound documents. Fields marked * are required.
Identity
Shown on letterhead / branding. Defaults to Legal Name.
Primary GSTIN. State code is auto-derived.
Registered Address
Branding
No logo uploaded
PNG / JPG / SVG — max 300 KB. Transparent background recommended.
No signature uploaded
PNG / JPG — max 150 KB. Transparent or var(--glass-panel) background.
No stamp uploaded
PNG / JPG — max 200 KB. A round/transparent-background stamp works best. Used on Documents (signature/stamp block).
No letterhead uploaded. PDFs will use the default layout.
Upload a full-page A4 letterhead image (PNG or JPG — max 800 KB). For best results use A4 portrait at 150-300 DPI. When set, proposal PDFs will render content over this letterhead and the GSTIN/PAN/logo shown at the top of the PDF will be suppressed (since they're expected to be baked into the letterhead).

Tip: If your letterhead is a Word document or PDF, open it, export as PNG/JPG at A4 size, then upload the exported image here.
Authorised Signatory
Bank Details (printed on invoices for client remittance)

Terms Templates Library
Maintain multiple named templates per document type — e.g. "Standard", "Enterprise", "Government". One is marked the default and auto-loads when creating new documents. Switch between templates on the document form at time of creation. Clients can also be locked to a specific template via Client Master.
Proposal Templates
Purchase Order Templates
Invoice Templates
Email Templates
The subject & body used when you send invoices, proposals, purchase orders, payment reminders and renewal reminders. Pick a document type and tone, edit the text, then Save. The {{placeholders}} below are filled in automatically at send time — and everything stays editable in the send window.
Insert a placeholder (click to add at the cursor):
Saved

OEM & Product Master

Maintain the central catalog of OEMs (vendors / principals) and the products you sell from each. Used to populate dropdowns across prospects, proposals, POs, and invoices. Includes contact info, registered address, and optional default GST treatment.

Vendors / OEMs

Products for Select an OEM

Select an OEM from the left to view and manage products.

OEM Details (used on Purchase Orders)

OEM origin:
Bank Details(for remittance — kept on file as a record)
Changes save automatically.

Services Catalog

Maintain the catalog of professional services Masterstone offers directly (AI consultancy, security audits, vCISO retainers, etc.). Used to populate Service-mode proposals and invoices. Each entry can carry a default scope template, duration, fee, and SAC code.

Services

Editing: Select a service to edit

Pick a service from the list on the left to view and edit its template, or add a new one above.
Free-text (e.g. "4-6 weeks", "Annual", "Retainer").
Pre-tax. Editable per proposal.
998313 = IT consulting (default).

Default Scope Template

This template auto-fills when you create a Service proposal that references this service. Numbered sections with bullets — exactly the format used in your professional service proposals.

Attachments Storage

Files attached to prospects, proposals, contracts, purchase orders, and invoices are stored locally in your browser. Since storage is shared with all CRM data, attachments are kept compact. Use the Manage All button above to review, download, or delete any attachment.

Active Portfolio Export

Generates a detailed Excel (.xlsx) report of your current portfolio. Useful for offline analysis or sharing with finance teams.

Manual System Backup

Creates a complete snapshot of your entire CRM — every contract, proposal, purchase order, invoice, client, OEM, attachment, and setting — bundled into a single JSON file with a schema version stamp for safe future migration.

Bulk Provisioning

Upload a CSV/Excel file to add multiple subscriptions at once. Use the template for correct formatting.

Upload CSV / Excel

Restore System Data

Danger Zone: This will completely overwrite your current system data with the selected backup file.

Mac App Settings

Mac-app-specific behaviour: where iPhone snapshots and database backups go, how many to keep, the conflict guard, and the indigo top banner. These settings are stored in the app's own settings store, separate from your CRM data.
iPhone Snapshot
Empty = use default. Snapshots written here on app quit.
snapshots (oldest auto-purged)
Auto-backup
Empty = use the destination's default location.
daily backups
Conflict Guard
Top Banner Recovery
Brings back the indigo Mac-app banner at the top of the window if you closed it.
Broken-Link Scanner
Scans every stored local file path (contracts, proposals, POs) and lists the ones that no longer resolve on your disk. Catches silent rot before you need a document for a client.
Advanced — Production cutover
When you're ready to switch from the HTML CRM to the Mac app permanently:
  1. Open the HTML CRM, Settings → Backup → Export full backup as JSON
  2. Run migrate.py on that JSON to produce a fresh masterstone.db
  3. In the Mac app, replace the database via the first-launch wizard (delete the old file at ~/Library/Application Support/com.masterstone.crm/masterstone.db first, restart, point picker at the new file)
  4. Archive the HTML version (zip Masterstone_CRM.html + the JSON, label with today's date)

Advanced

Tools for advanced maintenance. Most users never need these — they exist for cases where the one-time migrations were skipped or need to be re-run.
Consistency Scan (Prospects · Proposals · POs · Invoices)
Detects: proposal client-name mismatches, PO commercial-routing drift from linked proposal, invoice routing drift from linked contract/proposal, and legacy PO free-text reseller entries. Downloads a full JSON backup before any change.
Commission Payable — Portfolio Summary
Accruals auto-create on Paid+Commission invoices. Record payouts from each reseller's detail page.

CA Export

Generates the monthly Excel for your CA in the exact column layout from the pre-CRM Master file. Sales sheet pulls from issued invoices; Payments sheet pulls from contract AP invoices, consultants, and service vendors. Invoice numbers are hyperlinked to OneDrive where the link is populated on the record.

Coverage notes
• Sales sheet: all invoices with status Issued, Paid, or Credit-Note-Issued in the chosen period
• Payments sheet: contract AP invoices + consultant payments + service-vendor payments
• Invoice numbers link to OneDrive where the cloud URL is on the record (fall back to plain text otherwise)
• Foreign-OEM lines: GST shown as IGST only (your CA handles the RCM logic)
• Download Invoices (zip): bundles the actual invoice files (Sales + OEM/Purchase + Consultant) for the same Month + Scope, with an INDEX.txt checklist. CRM-stored files and local files are packed; OneDrive-link-only items are listed in the index.
• Filename: Masterstone_GST_{Month}_{Year}.xlsx or Masterstone_FY{xx-yy}_thru_{Month}{Year}.xlsx

Accounting & E-Invoicing Export

Two Excel reports for your CA / accounting software (Tally, Zoho Books) — both filtered by the Financial Year and Client chosen below. Dates print as dd-mm-yyyy and all value/currency columns are comma-separated.

What each report contains
• Export Accounting Data: flattened line-item report — two sheets (AR Sales, AP Purchases) with split GST and FY-crossover flags. Filtered to invoices raised in the selected FY (and Client).
• Contract-wise Register: one workbook with a Contract Summary sheet (one row per contract — sales/purchase totals & margin) and an Invoices sheet (every sales & purchase invoice grouped under its contract, showing both currencies where applicable).
• Both honour the FY (invoice-raised date) and Client selectors above; choose All Years / All Clients for the full picture.

Documents

Save reusable document templates (authorization letters, declarations, certificates, etc.). Use {{Field Name}} markers for the parts that change each time — you'll be prompted to fill them, then preview and print/save as PDF on your letterhead.

Upload Word (.docx): fill spots are detected automatically — a run of 3+ underscores becomes {{Blank N}}, [Field] and <Field> become {{Field}}, and any existing {{Field}} markers are kept as-is. Word formatting (bold, lists, tables) is preserved. Old .doc files aren't supported — re-save as .docx first.

Template Library

Template Name Category Fields Last Edited Actions

New Template

Detected fields
None yet — add {{Field Name}} markers in the body.
Formatting tips
• Blank line = new paragraph
• **text** = bold
• Line starting with - = bullet point
• {{Field Name}} = a blank you fill in each time
• {{signature}} = your digital signature/stamp here
• {{blank signature}} = empty space to sign by hand (no image/stamp)
• {{space}} = a blank line of vertical space (stack for more)
• Keep the {{Field Name}} markers — each one becomes a fill-in box
• Blanks (___), [Field] and <Field> were already converted when the Word file was imported
• Click into the page to edit text directly — Word formatting (bold, lists, tables) is preserved
• {{signature}} = your digital signature/stamp here
• {{blank signature}} = empty space to sign by hand (no image/stamp)
• {{space}} = a blank line of vertical space (stack for more)

Fill Template

Fill in the blanks
Save to Documents
File name
Signature & stamp
Live preview
Letterhead & print arrive in the next update

Generated Documents

Documents you generated from a template and chose to save. Assign each to a client (or mark as Other). Once printed, signed and scanned, use Mark Issued to attach the signed PDF — the issued copy then becomes the version stored and available for export bundles.

Document Client / For Created Status Actions

Document Export

Bundle a deal's or a client's documents into a single .zip with an INDEX.txt checklist. Files stored inside the CRM (signed invoices, contract/PO attachments, issued documents) are packed into the zip; documents that live only as OneDrive links or local files are listed in the index with their location so nothing is missed.

Narrow with the filters above (they refine each other), then click an OEM invoice to select it.

Missing Local Files · all clients

Every document across all clients that has a reference or link but no local file attached yet. Click Set local file to point it at the file on disk — it saves straight to that record, so you don't have to open each contract.

Attachments Manager

Global Storage Usage
—
Limits: 10 MB per file · 50 MB per entity · 200 MB global soft limit (warning above this) · 250 MB hard block to preserve CRM operation. Data persists to SQLite via the desktop app; localStorage is the in-memory cache.

Terms Preview — —

Preview of how the Terms & Conditions and Payment Terms will appear on the generated PDF. Actual styling may adjust slightly to fit the page and letterhead.

Contacts
Add as many contacts as needed. Mark one as Primary — it appears on proposals, invoices, and in list views.
Compliance & Legal
Default Commercial Routing — Optional
Pre-fills new Prospects / Proposals / POs for this client. Always overridable per deal.
Resellers and channel partners are managed separately in the Resellers / Partners module. If this client typically comes through one reseller, set it here — otherwise leave as Direct.
Only required when model is Resale or Commission.
GSTIN Registrations
Add one per state registration — mark one as Primary.
Billing Addresses
Optionally link each to a GSTIN for accurate invoicing.
Shipping / Delivery Addresses
Custom Terms for This Client
Override the default terms templates from Company Profile for this specific client. Enable the toggle for a document type below to override its default terms and payment terms — useful for key accounts with negotiated T&C (e.g. specific BFSI or government clients with their own mandated clauses).

These drive commercial routing in Phases 4B–4D — no effect on current transactions yet.

Used only for Commission model. Per-deal & per-invoice overrides still win.
Default OFF. Turn ON only if this reseller explicitly requires end-user name on the invoice.
Default OFF. If ON, proposals can optionally route to end-client contact.
Internal Notes

Phase 4A Migration Review

What this does: moves existing reseller-tagged records from Client Master into the new Reseller/Partner Master. A full JSON backup + a Client Master CSV will download to your Downloads folder before any change is committed. You can approve, adjust, or cancel.
If you cancel, the review will not reappear automatically. You can re-trigger it from System Controls → Advanced.

Consistency Repair — Prospects · Proposals · POs · Invoices

A full JSON backup downloads automatically before any change. Only checked items in auto-fixable categories are modified — legacy free-text items are informational only.

Record Commission Payout

Historical Commission Backfill

A JSON backup downloads before accruals are created. Each backfilled accrual is tagged backfilled: true so you can identify them.
